name: onexplayer-apex-tools
description: Decky Loader plugin for OneXPlayer Apex fixes and fan control

scripts.package: rollup -c && rm -rf 'OneXPlayer Apex Tools' && mkdir -p 'OneXPlayer Apex Tools/dist' 'OneXPlayer Apex Tools/py_modules' && cp package.json plugin.json main.py 'OneXPlayer Apex Tools/' && cp dist/index.js 'OneXPlayer Apex Tools/dist/' && cp py_modules/*.py 'OneXPlayer Apex Tools/py_modules/' && rm -f OneXPlayer_Apex_Tools.zip && zip -r OneXPlayer_Apex_Tools.zip 'OneXPlayer Apex Tools' && rm -rf 'OneXPlayer Apex Tools'
